originalTitle: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
originalDescription: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.

originalTitle: Barca say refereeing 'errors' cost them Champions League semi-final spot
originalDescription: Barcelona say refereeing "errors" cost them a place in the semi-finals of the Champions League, and have caused "significant sporting and financial harm to the club".

originalTitle: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
originalDescription: Ashley Cole won 107 caps for England, seventh on the all‑time list, but says he was "discouraged" by those in the football pyramid from becoming a head coach.

originalTitle: Why Silva will be remembered as a Man City legend
originalDescription: BBC Sport takes a look at Bernardo Silva's glittering career at Manchester City and why fans will never forget him.

originalTitle: Chelsea midfielder Caicedo agrees new contract
originalDescription: Chelsea midfielder Moises Caicedo agrees a lucrative new contract at Stamford Bridge as the club seeks to reward its high performers.

originalTitle: Sutton's predictions v boxer Molly McCann & the Boo Radleys
originalDescription: Chris Sutton takes on boxer Molly McCann and The Boo Radley's frontman Sice Rowbottom plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

originalTitle: Bellingham says Camavinga red 'a joke' as Real fury grows
originalDescription: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham says the decision to send off team-mate Eduardo Camavinga during their 4-3 Champions League loss to Bayern Munich was "a joke".

originalTitle: Fifa blamed for $100 World Cup trains from New York
originalDescription: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill accuses Fifa of failing to provide funding, which means fans must foot the bill for high transport costs at the World Cup this summer.

originalTitle: Hard-punching cruiserweight Rozicki signs with Zuffa Boxing
originalDescription: Hard-punching cruiserweight Ryan Rozicki has signed a multi-fight deal with Zuffa Boxing.

originalTitle: Hull FC vs St Helens - latest score
'Zero fear' - Millwall boss Neil urges Lions to embrace promotion challenge
originalDescription: Millwall should have "zero fear" as the race for promotion from the Championship heats up, says boss Alex Neil.

originalTitle: Oxagon scoops Craven success for in-form Gosden team
originalDescription: Oxagon threw his hat into the 2000 Guineas ring with a front-running victory in the Betway Craven Stakes.

originalTitle: Gordon among star trio that could leave Newcastle
originalDescription: There is an expectation at Newcastle that Anthony Gordon would be keen on a move away this summer.

originalTitle: Sheffield Wednesday's future depends on crucial next three weeks
originalDescription: The next three weeks could be crucial for Sheffield Wednesday, as they look to complete a takeover which will secure the club's future.

originalTitle: Porto down to 10 at Nottingham Forest LIVE!
'They're done' - Leicester to be relegated 10 years after PL triumph?
originalDescription: A decade ago to this very day, Leicester City were sat atop the Premier League table on their way to a glorious, historic title.
